work_unit: SZ-SP-L-005: Tab buttons lack ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation
situation: SidePanelApp tab navigation uses plain <button> elements without ARIA roles, making the tab interface invisible to screen readers. No keyboard arrow-key navigation between tabs. Tab content panels lack role=tabpanel association.
action: Added complete WAI-ARIA tab pattern: role=tablist on container with aria-label, role=tab + id + aria-selected + aria-controls + tabIndex on each button, onKeyDown handler for ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End with programmatic focus via tabRefs, role=tabpanel + id + aria-labelledby + tabIndex on each content panel. Direct-edit in worktree (case-104 escape hatch) because cp-guard detected divergent SidePanelApp.tsx from prior SZ-SP-L-001/L-002 fixes.
outcome_evidence: Commit bdf610b on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225, pushed to origin. 1 file changed, 49 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-). TypeScript compiles (no type errors in JSX ARIA attributes). Keyboard nav covers ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End per WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices.
next_suggestion: SZ-SP-L-006 (Delete button uses x as only label — ambiguous for screen readers) or SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection has no timeout). Both are low-severity route-fixes in shizi sidepanel/popup.

audit_findings.finding: Tab navigation buttons lacked role=tab, aria-selected, aria-controls, tabIndex, and keyboard arrow-key navigation. Container lacked role=tablist. Content panels lacked role=tabpanel.
audit_findings.remediation: Added full WAI-ARIA tab pattern with keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End) and programmatic focus management.
